item.title: WATCH: Romantic Valentine’s Day lights in Michigan
item.description: Dearborn Peace Park West is decorated with Valentine’s Day-themed lights and displays.

item.title: Partial shutdown hits DHS: What to know about negotiations, potential impacts
item.description: Lawmakers remain at an impasse over immigration enforcement, with Department of Homeland Security funding set to run out at the end of the day Friday.

item.title: WATCH: Meet the family behind Clemmons Family Farm
item.description: As Black farmers have lost much of their land over the past century, one Vermont family is reclaiming its land for future generations.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Law enforcement activity near Guthrie's home
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: WATCH: CA Gov. Gavin Newsom calls Pres. Trump “temporary” in message to world leaders
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom called on world leaders attending the Munich Security Conference in Germany to think about a future without President Tru...
